ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_groups" (
  "release_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release group */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the release group belongs to */,
  "release_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the release group */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the release group */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Name of the distributor for the release group */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of release (e.g., theatrical, streaming) */,
  "marketing_budget" REAL /* Marketing budget for the release group */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_groups_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office_earnings" (
  "earnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings record */,
  "release_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release group the earnings belong to */,
  "worldwide_earnings" REAL /* Worldwide box office earnings */,
  "domestic_earnings" REAL /* Domestic box office earnings */,
  "foreign_earnings" REAL /* Foreign box office earnings */,
  "domestic_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of domestic earnings */,
  "foreign_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of foreign earnings */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit from the movie */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit from the movie */,
  "opening_weekend_earnings" REAL /* Earnings during the opening weekend */,
  "total_theaters" INTEGER /* Total number of theaters the movie was shown in */,
  "average_earnings_per_theater" REAL /* Average earnings per theater */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_earnings_release_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_group_id") REFERENCES release_groups ("release_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the territory belongs to */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the territory */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings_by_region" (
  "earnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings record */,
  "release_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release group the earnings belong to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the earnings belong to */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Box office earnings for the region */,
  "total_theaters" INTEGER /* Total number of theaters in the region */,
  "average_earnings_per_theater" REAL /* Average earnings per theater in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_by_region_release_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_group_id") REFERENCES release_groups ("release_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings_by_territory" (
  "earnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings record */,
  "release_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release group the earnings belong to */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory the earnings belong to */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Box office earnings for the territory */,
  "total_theaters" INTEGER /* Total number of theaters in the territory */,
  "average_earnings_per_theater" REAL /* Average earnings per theater in the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_by_territory_release_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_group_id") REFERENCES release_groups ("release_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, executive) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., earnings, performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_fetched" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data fetch */,
  "fetch_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data fetch (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the import is from */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_data" TEXT /* Data imported from the source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the import failed */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the imported file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the genre belongs to */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the director belongs to */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
